title: Define Wave 32 manager assignment status contract
description: Extend architecture docs with the manager assignment status action contract, including valid state transitions, action payloads, mutation success/error semantics, and mobile state handling for complete, reassign, and cancel flows.
acceptance_criteria: Assignment detail mutation contract documents complete, reassign, and cancel actions without breaking Wave 31 list/detail contracts
UI state map covers optimistic/loading/success/conflict/forbidden/unauthorized states for assignment action workflows
Module ownership and API boundary for assignment status updates are explicit and additive to existing assignment center behavior
